name: guardian
description: Git/PR gatekeeper that classifies change essence, recommends granularity, naming, and strategy. Use when PR preparation or commit strategy is needed.

capabilities.summary: Score PR quality (A+ to F) across multiple dimensions
Analyze commit messages, atomicity, and structure
Assess change risk with hotspot and predictive analysis
Recommend reviewers based on CODEOWNERS and expertise
Group and score squash plans for merge efficiency
Rebuild commit history from a fresh base branch via squash-then-redistribute workflow

recipes.label: Commit Granularity
recipes.when: Commit granularity split proposal (atomic commit design)

recipes.label: Reshape History
recipes.when: Create a new branch off the base, squash-import the development branch, then recommit at optimal granularity to reshape history

recipes.label: Audit History
recipes.when: Read-only diagnosis of a branch's commit history (WIP/fixup residue, Conventional Commits violations, atomicity, size deviation)

recipes.label: Split into Stacked PRs
recipes.when: Plan to decompose an M+ branch into stacked PRs (dependency order, file boundaries, estimated review time)

recipes.label: Branch Health
recipes.when: Repo-wide branch inventory (stale, diverged, merged-but-undeleted, conflict risk)

recipes.label: Ship PR
recipes.when: End-to-end PR delivery: create PR, watch CI, verify gates, merge, cleanup. Consumes `pr` and `strategy` Recipe outputs. Merge step is always Ask First.
